service_interrupted.title: :warning: Failure in Event Processing
service_interrupted.description:
The developer has automatically been notified of this error.
No further action is required.

milestone_rpl_stake.title: :tada: Milestone Reached
milestone_rpl_stake.description: %{result_value} RPL has been staked by node operators!

milestone_max_deposit_size.title: :tada: Milestone Reached
milestone_max_deposit_size.description: The maximum deposit size has reached **%{result_value}** ETH!

milestone_rpl_swapped.title: :tada: Milestone Reached
milestone_rpl_swapped.description: %{result_value}% of all RPL has been exchanged for the new version!

milestone_rocksolid_tvl.title: :tada: Milestone Reached
milestone_rocksolid_tvl.description: %{result_value} rETH deposited into the RockSolid vault!

mev_proposal_event.title: :moneybag: Large Minipool Proposal
mev_proposal_event.description: Validator %{validator} has proposed a block worth **%{reward_amount} ETH**!

mev_proposal_smoothie_event.title: :cup_with_straw: Large Smoothing Pool Proposal
mev_proposal_smoothie_event.description: Validator %{validator} has proposed a block worth **%{reward_amount} ETH**!

finality_delay_event.title: :warning: Finality Delay On Beacon Chain
finality_delay_event.description:
Finality has been delayed for **%{finality_delay} Epochs** on the Beacon Chain!

Please make sure that your node is operating correctly to minimize inactivity leak! **Every attestation counts!**

finality_delay_recover_event.title: :tada: Finality Recovered
finality_delay_recover_event.description: Finality has been recovered on the Beacon Chain!
